mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_coach_nudge (user_id, request_id, trigger_source, action_type, pedagogical_goal, title, summary, target_route, priority, status, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{requestId}, #{triggerSource}, #{actionType}, #{pedagogicalGoal}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{targetRoute}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{metadataJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_coach_nudge WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > #{now}) ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
